summary: The tender primarily involves the provision of ICT personnel resources on a time and materials basis, with payments based on actual time spent and materials used, capped at a Not-To-Exceed (NTE) price.
primary_evidence: T&M Services (up to an NTE Price)
proposed Labour Rates for the applicable SFIA skillsets
The Supplier must stop provision of Services when the NTE Price is reached
secondary_indicators: Supplier's Quotation is to include pricing on the basis of: Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price)
reasoning: The tender documents consistently emphasize the use of a time and materials pricing model, with specific references to labour rates, SFIA skillsets, and a capped NTE price. The focus on providing ICT personnel resources further supports the classification as staff augmentation time and materials.
